name: topo3d-antilles
description: Jumeaux numeriques 3D pour collectivites Guadeloupe + Martinique (KCI)

scripts.serve: node -e "const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const PORT=process.env.PORT||5173; const ROOT=process.cwd(); const MIME={'.html':'text/html;charset=utf-8','.js':'application/javascript','.css':'text/css','.json':'application/json','.geojson':'application/geo+json','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.svg':'image/svg+xml'}; http.createServer((req,res)=>{let p=decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]);if(p==='/')p='/index.html';let fp=path.join(ROOT,p);try{if(fs.statSync(fp).isDirectory())fp=path.join(fp,'index.html');const data=fs.readFileSync(fp);res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':MIME[path.extname(fp)]||'application/octet-stream','Cache-Control':'no-cache'});res.end(data);}catch(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not Found: '+p);}}).listen(PORT,()=>console.log('http://localhost:'+PORT));"

author: Dereck Rauzduel <contact@karukera-conseil.com>
